events.name: Power Outage!
events.description: NEPA has struck again! The power is gone.
events.message: Darkness falls. Somewhere, a NEPA official laughs.

choices.label: Wait for power
choices.message: You sit in darkness. Hope is not a strategy.

choices.label: Switch to Generator
choices.message: I better pass my neighbor! *Generator roars to life*

choices.label: Use Charcoal Stove
choices.message: Back to basics. The old ways save you.

events.name: Visitor Enters Kitchen
events.message: Aunty Bose has entered the kitchen. She's already judging.

choices.label: Ignore and keep cooking
choices.message: You pretend she's not there. She pretends you're not rude. Everyone pretends.

choices.label: Give her a taste
choices.message: She tastes it. She pauses. The pause is LOUD.

choices.label: Ask her opinion
choices.message: She suggests adding ogiri. This changes EVERYTHING.

events.name: Pepper is Too Much!
events.description: You've added enough pepper to summon fire spirits.
events.message: Smoke is coming from the pot. Your eyes are watering. This is not a drill.

choices.label: Add Water
choices.message: You dilute the pepper. And the flavor. And your pride.

choices.label: Add More Vegetables
choices.message: Smart. Vegetables absorb heat. You are a problem solver.

choices.label: Pretend Nothing Happened
choices.message: You serve it anyway. 'The pepper is the point,' you insist, sweating.
